bugs_remaining: curl-agent.sh test #9 is stale: it expects HTTP 200 with sanctions_ok=false on the Tornado Cash address, but the round-3 P1 fix now (correctly) returns HTTP 403 application/problem+json with code=compliance_blocked_sanctions. The server behavior is right (fails closed, sanctions_source=fallback); the smoke test needs updating to assert the problem+json contract instead of the old sanctions_ok=false JSON shape.
recommendation: Ship the server as-is; update tests/curl-agent.sh step 9 to validate status=403, content-type=application/problem+json, and body.code=compliance_blocked_sanctions so the smoke suite aligns with the corrected round-3 contract.
